about.title: About Me
about.bio1: I'm a passionate information systems engineer with a strong background in data analysis and software development. I enjoy turning complex data into actionable insights and building tools that make a difference.
about.bio2: When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, or writing about software engineering and data science.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: A performant, multilingual portfolio and blog built with Astro and Tailwind CSS. Features static generation, i18n routing, and a clean responsive design.

dataDashboard.title: Real-Time Data Dashboard
dataDashboard.description: Interactive analytics dashboard visualizing streaming data with React and D3.js. Backend powered by FastAPI with WebSocket support for live updates.

etlPipeline.title: ETL Data Pipeline
etlPipeline.description: Scalable ETL pipeline processing terabytes of data daily. Built with Apache Airflow for orchestration, Python for transformations, and Docker for containerization.

mlClassifier.title: ML Text Classifier
mlClassifier.description: Machine learning text classification system using scikit-learn and natural language processing techniques. Achieved 94% accuracy on test datasets with optimized feature extraction.

job1.description: Lead data initiatives across the organization, building automated dashboards and predictive models that informed key business decisions. Managed a team of three junior analysts.

job2.description: Developed ETL processes and interactive reports for stakeholders. Migrated legacy reporting systems to modern BI tools, reducing report generation time by 60%.

job3.description: Assisted in data collection, cleaning, and visualization for quarterly business reviews. Built automated Excel reporting tools that reduced manual data processing by 40%.

item1.title: Led data platform migration
item1.description: Spearheaded migration of company-wide analytics platform to AWS, improving query performance by 3x.

item2.title: Graduated with honors
item2.description: Completed BSc in Information Systems Engineering with a thesis on predictive analytics for business intelligence.

item3.title: First industry internship
item3.description: Joined DataStart as a data analyst intern, working on customer segmentation and churn prediction models.

item4.title: Started university
item4.description: Began studies in Information Systems Engineering. Founded the university's data science club.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, opportunities, or collaborations. Feel free to reach out!
